Petra Svobodová
Data Analyst · Prague, Czech Republic
petra.svobodova@example.cz · +420 776 102 244 · linkedin.com/in/petrasvobodovacz
Summary
Data Analyst with 3 years of experience transitioning from marketing analytics into a
product-data role. Owns SQL and dbt modelling, dashboards in Looker, and ad-hoc Python
analyses. Looking to move toward a Data Scientist track over the next two years.
Experience
Data Analyst — Rohlik.cz, Prague
March 2024 – present (2 years)
Owns the dbt 1.7 mart serving the operations team — 42 models on PostgreSQL 15, with
column-level tests on every primary key. Reduced the daily ops-dashboard refresh from 18
minutes to 4 minutes by rewriting two incremental models.
Built the warehouse-picking productivity dashboard in Looker, now used by 6 warehouse
managers across Prague-Uhříněves and Brno-Slatina; flagged a 9.2% drop in picks-per-hour
after a shift-pattern change that was rolled back in week 3.
Marketing Analyst — Productboard, Prague
September 2023 – February 2024 (6 months)
Built the paid-acquisition attribution model in Python 3.11 (pandas 2.2, scikit-learn 1.4)
combining Google Ads and LinkedIn Ads spend with HubSpot pipeline data. Replaced the
spreadsheet-based CAC report with a weekly Looker dashboard.
Junior Marketing Analyst — Productboard, Prague
June 2023 – August 2023 (3 months internship-to-hire)
Wrote the first SQL workbook for the SDR team and ran the first cohort-retention analysis on
the self-serve trial funnel, identifying a 14% activation gap for EU SMB accounts.
Education
Ing. (M.Sc.) in Quantitative Methods — VŠE Prague
2021 – 2023, thesis on uplift modelling for direct-mail campaigns using R's causalTree
package.
Bc. (B.Sc.) in Economics and Management — VŠE Prague
2018 – 2021.
Skills
SQL (PostgreSQL 15, BigQuery), Python 3.11 (pandas 2.2, scikit-learn 1.4), dbt 1.7, Looker,
light Airflow 2.9 DAG maintenance, Git.
Languages: Czech (native), English (C1, CAE 2022).
